title: ochna mexicana
intro: Ochna mexicana, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Ochna mexicana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
